notes: Version 4.1.4. Anti-resell branding: every generated node now carries a locked free-service mark plus the channel handle (سرویس رایگان نوا @irnova_proxy) in its name, so anyone who receives a resold config can see it is free and where to get it. The mark is hardcoded in the worker and cannot be turned off or renamed from the panel, a template, or a prefix/suffix. Pure string change, no wrangler or binding changes.
